emotional_tone: Professional, reliable, authoritative, clear, and efficient.

headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for all headings. Never center by default. Use fluid scales for the hero heading, max text-6xl. Import from Fontshare: @import url('https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@800,500,700,400,300,900&display=swap');

body.usage: Loose line-height (leading-relaxed) for readability. Used for all paragraphs, forms, and data tables. Import from Fontshare: @import url('https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=satoshi@900,700,500,300,400&display=swap');

mono.usage: Used for certificate ID, verification codes, API keys, and numeric data in the dashboard.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background (#FFFFFF), sharp 1px border (#E5E7EB), no shadow by default. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow.
surface_strategies.sticky_header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-gray-200. Must have z-50.
surface_strategies.template_editor_sidebar: Solid background (#FAFAFA) with border-r border-gray-200. Contextual right sidebar adapts to selected elements.

component_instructions.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). Primary button: bg-[#0A58CA] text-white hover:bg-[#084298]. Secondary: bg-white text-[#111827] border border-[#111827] hover:bg-gray-50.
component_instructions.inputs: Shadcn UI Input, Select, Checkbox. Customize with sharp corners (rounded-none), focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0A58CA].
component_instructions.tables: Shadcn Table for data. Left-aligned, generous row height, hover state on rows (hover:bg-gray-50).
component_instructions.tabs: Shadcn Tabs, sharp underline style, text-[#4B5563] active:text-[#0A58CA] active:border-b-2 active:border-[#0A58CA].
component_instructions.charts: Recharts. Monochromatic blue palette with one contrasting accent (e.g., #0A58CA and #FFC107).
component_instructions.editor_canvas: Central canvas area with a white A4 proportion box (shadow-md). Contextual toolbar floats above or to the right of the selected element. Left sidebar for tools/layers.

icons.usage: Use for navigation, editor tools, and dashboard metrics. Stroke width 1.5 for a clean, professional look.

animations.micro: Hover states on all interactive elements: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
animations.page_transitions: Fade in and slight slide up (using framer-motion if necessary, otherwise simple CSS).

accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.
accessibility.test_ids: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements (e.g., 'login-submit-button', 'canvas-text-element').

marketing.hero_bg: Use abstract CSS grid patterns or large typography. No heavy images to avoid clutter.

instructions_to_main_agent: Import Cabinet Grotesk and Satoshi via Fontshare in the CSS file.
Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom color palette and font families.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing landing pages to ensure asymmetrical and unique layouts. Avoid generic centered layouts.
Use Shadcn UI for the dashboard, template editor interface, and forms. Heavily customize border radii (max rounded-sm) and colors to match the Swiss High-Contrast archetype.

The Template Builder MUST have a left sidebar for assets/layers, a central canvas area with a white A4 proportion box (shadow-md) representing the certificate, and a contextual top or right floating toolbar for the selected element's properties.
In the dashboard, use the 'Control Room' grid layout: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use h-full on widgets to avoid jagged bottoms.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, inputs, and interactive components. This is CRITICAL for automated testing.
